record_snapshot.note: Copied current case record before editing.

duplicate_guard.reason: Queued case targets an existing record with the same slug; no near-duplicate branch was created.

identity_gate.notes: The queued headline stays within the same incident family as the existing Muzaffarpur hospital fire case. It adds a later enforcement action (clinic sealing) while the existing frozen The Hindu reports still support the six-death and arrest details.
supporting_quotes: After 7 deaths in hospital fire, 13 private clinics sealed in Muzaffarpur - The Federal
Three staff members arrested after a deadly fire at a Muzaffarpur hospital led to the deaths of six ICU patients.

changes.value: A fire broke out in the ICU of Prasad Hospital in Muzaffarpur, Bihar, on 4 June 2026. Later reporting said the death toll rose to six ICU patients, that three staff members — doctor Pankaj, admin manager Ram Kumar, and maintenance manager Ajit Kumar — were arrested, and that 13 private clinics were sealed in Muzaffarpur after the fire.

changes.value: The queued Federal headline says the fire was followed by 7 deaths, but the frozen case sources still support 6 deaths, so the record keeps deaths: 6 and flags the discrepancy.

draft_diff.notes: Kept deaths at 6, kept injuries null, and added the later clinic-sealing headline as an amber follow-up with a conflict note for the 6-vs-7 death count.

critic_review.notes: The new clinic-sealing statement is limited to the preserved headline snippet, and the record explicitly flags the death-toll discrepancy instead of reconciling it by guesswork.

validation.notes: Frontmatter parses cleanly, the case file is build-safe, the source URLs are specific, the record remains one case only, and the new claim is bounded to the frozen headline while the 6-vs-7 conflict is flagged.
